title: BEM-827 quarantine bad JSON
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
from pathlib import Path
import json, re, shutil
for d in ['scripts','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_bad','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:26 (UTC+3)'
queue_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
bad_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_bad')
quarantined=[]
valid=[]
for p in sorted(queue_dir.glob('*.json')):
    try:
        json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='strict'))
        valid.append(str(p))
    except Exception as exc:
        target=bad_dir/(p.name+'.bad')
        if target.exists():
            target=bad_dir/(p.stem+'.'+str(len(list(bad_dir.glob(p.stem+'*'))))+'.json.bad')
        shutil.move(str(p), str(target))
        quarantined.append({'from':str(p),'to':str(target),'error':str(exc)})
# clean retry item, valid JSON only
retry=queue_dir/'bem827_claude_dispatch_retry_clean.json'
retry.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v4','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-827 clean retry after invalid queue JSON quarantine','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep, encoding='utf-8')
# sanitizer script, no inline Python in workflow
san=Path('scripts/sanitize_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
san.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json, shutil\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nQUEUE=Path("governance/workflow_dispatch_queue")\nBAD=Path("governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_bad")\nSTATE=Path("governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_sanitizer_state.json")\nQUEUE.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nBAD.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nSTATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\nquarantined=[]\nvalid=[]\nfor p in sorted(QUEUE.glob("*.json")):\n    try:\n        json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="strict"))\n        valid.append(str(p))\n    except Exception as exc:\n        target=BAD/(p.name+".bad")\n        i=1\n        while target.exists():\n            target=BAD/(p.stem+"."+str(i)+".json.bad")\n            i+=1\n        shutil.move(str(p), str(target))\n        quarantined.append({"from":str(p),"to":str(target),"error":str(exc)})\nSTATE.write_text(json.dumps({"schema_version":"workflow_dispatch_queue_sanitizer_state.v1","status":"sanitized","checked_at":now,"valid_count":len(valid),"quarantined_count":len(quarantined),"valid":valid[-50:],"quarantined":quarantined},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP, encoding="utf-8")\nprint(json.dumps({"status":"sanitized","valid_count":len(valid),"quarantined_count":len(quarantined)},ensure_ascii=False))\n''', encoding='utf-8')
# insert sanitizer before existing Dispatch workflow queue step
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
runner_changed=False
if runner.exists():
    txt=runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
    if 'scripts/sanitize_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' not in txt:
        step='''      - name: Sanitize workflow dispatch queue\n        if: always()\n        run: python3 scripts/sanitize_workflow_dispatch_queue.py\n'''
        anchor='      - name: Dispatch workflow queue'
        if anchor in txt:
            txt=txt.replace(anchor, step+anchor, 1)
        else:
            txt += sep+step
        runner.write_text(txt, encoding='utf-8')
        runner_changed=True
state={'bem':'BEM-827','status':'bad_dispatch_json_quarantined','quarantined':quarantined,'valid_before':valid,'retry_item':str(retry),'sanitizer':str(san),'runner_changed':runner_changed,'created_at':created,'next_action':'run fresh tick and verify dispatch queue no longer crashes on JSONDecodeError'}
Path('governance/state/bem827_quarantine_bad_dispatch_json.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem827_quarantine_bad_dispatch_json.md').write_text('# BEM-827 | Quarantine Bad Dispatch JSON | DONE'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify dispatch queue no JSONDecodeError. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-827'+sep+sep+'Bad queue JSON quarantined. Next: fresh tick and verify dispatch queue.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem827_quarantine_bad_dispatch_json','status':'bad_dispatch_json_quarantined','quarantined_count':len(quarantined),'runner_changed':runner_changed,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['scripts/sanitize_workflow_dispatch_queue.py','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem827_claude_dispatch_retry_clean.json','governance/state/bem827_quarantine_bad_dispatch_json.json','governance/reports/bem827_quarantine_bad_dispatch_json.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
if runner_changed: changed_files.append('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
for item in quarantined: changed_files.append(item['to'])
ops_applied.append('Quarantined invalid workflow_dispatch_queue JSON files, created a clean Claude dispatch retry item, and installed sanitizer before dispatch queue processing')
"""
No issue comments.
